features.name: Ice Walk
features.description: The dragon can move across and climb icy surfaces without needing to make an ability check. Additionally, Difficult Terrain composed of ice or snow doesn't cost it extra movement.

features.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day, or 4/Day in Lair)
features.description: If the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The dragon makes three Rend attacks.

actions.name: Rend
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +11, reach 10 ft. Hit: 13 (2d6 + 6) Slashing damage plus 4 (1d8) Cold damage.

actions.name: Cold Breath (Recharge 5–6)
actions.description: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 19, each creature in a 60-foot Cone. Failure: 54 (12d8) Cold damage. Success: Half damage.

legendary_actions.name: Legendary Action Uses
legendary_actions.description: 3 (4 in Lair). Immediately after another creature's turn, the dragon can expend a use to take one of the following actions. The dragon regains all expended uses at the start of each of its turns.

legendary_actions.name: Freezing Burst
legendary_actions.description: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 14, each creature in a 30-foot-radius Sphere centered on a point the dragon can see within 120 feet. Failure: 7 (2d6) Cold damage, and the target's Speed is 0 until the end of the target's next turn. Failure or Success: The dragon can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary_actions.name: Frightful Presence
legendary_actions.description: The dragon casts Fear, requiring no Material components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 14). The dragon can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

legendary_actions.name: Pounce
legendary_actions.description: The dragon moves up to half its Speed, and it makes one Rend attack.

tactical_info.tactics: Uses legendary resistance to maintain control. Legendary actions control battlefield between turns. Cold breath opens combat, then uses legendary actions for positioning and area denial.
